_meta.purpose: Faces shown on /plan-a-visit after a visitor picks a campus — 'Find someone like me'. Component reads via lib/content/campus-faces.ts.
_meta.poolMode: Until real per-campus photography is captured for every campus, we draw from a shared pool of real Futures portraits (captured across Paradise, Gwinnett, Franklin, Solo, Bali). The UI label is honest: 'Faces from the Futures family' rather than implying every face is from the selected campus. Swap to per-campus rows as real photography arrives — one campus at a time.
_meta.swapInstructions: When {campus} has ≥6 real captured portraits with signed releases, move those entries from 'pool' into byCampus['{campus-slug}'] and the component will flip that campus into per-campus mode automatically.
_meta.noFabrication: No invented names, no invented stories. If a person's name/story fields are empty, the card renders photo + generic 'a member of the Futures family' alt. When comms fills in name + firstSunday, the card unlocks story mode.
_meta.rotation: A deterministic monthly seed (YYYY-MM) selects which 6 of the pool show per campus per month. Same month = same faces. New month = reshuffle. Keeps the page feeling alive without per-request churn.
_meta.releases: Any entry with source='futures-comms' must have a signed model release in /ops/releases/ before shipping name/story fields. Photo-only (no name) is allowed without a release only if the photo is already published on a Futures public surface (existing /photos/voices/).
